clinic.name: Crescent Clinic
clinic.description: A multi-specialty clinic combining advanced medical technology with compassionate, personalized care — serving families across every stage of life.

slides.title: Your Health.
slides.subtitle: From preventive care to specialized treatments, we put your health first — every single visit.

slides.title: Expert Doctors.
slides.subtitle: Experienced doctors with trusted diagnosis and compassionate treatment.

slides.title: Caring for
slides.subtitle: From children to seniors, we offer healthcare tailored for every stage of life.

about.heading: About Us
paragraphs: Crescent Clinic is a trusted multi-specialty healthcare centre delivering compassionate and affordable medical care for families in and around Cheyyur.
From preventive checkups to specialist consultations, diagnostics, physiotherapy, and pharmacy support, we focus on providing complete care under one roof.

pillars.title: Experienced Team
pillars.desc: Qualified doctors, nurses, and support staff dedicated to patient wellbeing.

pillars.title: Modern Facilities
pillars.desc: Lab testing, ECG, pharmacy, and physiotherapy services available.

pillars.title: Patient First
pillars.desc: Friendly, personalised treatment plans with compassionate attention.

facilities.title: General Medicine
facilities.desc: Comprehensive diagnosis and treatment for common and chronic illnesses.

facilities.title: Women's Health
facilities.desc: Dedicated healthcare services for women’s wellness and routine care.

facilities.title: Paediatrics
facilities.desc: Healthcare support for infants, children, and adolescents.

facilities.title: Diabetology
facilities.desc: Diabetes screening, treatment, counselling, and follow-up care.

facilities.title: Diagnostics & Lab
facilities.desc: In-house laboratory services for routine and advanced tests.

facilities.title: ECG
facilities.desc: Heart health screening and ECG diagnostic support.

facilities.title: Physiotherapy
facilities.desc: Pain relief, mobility improvement, and rehabilitation services.

facilities.title: Pharmacy
facilities.desc: On-site pharmacy with essential medicines and prescriptions.

camps.title: Free Diabetes Screening Camp
camps.desc: Over 200 residents screened for diabetes and hypertension with free consultations.

camps.title: Women's Wellness Camp
camps.desc: Free gynaecology consultations, cancer awareness sessions, and nutrition counselling.

camps.title: Eye Health Camp
camps.desc: Free eye checkups for schoolchildren — 180 children screened, 40 spectacles provided.

camps.title: Child Vaccination Drive
camps.desc: Community vaccination program benefiting over 150 children under age 5.

testimonials.name: Ramya S.
testimonials.text: Dr. Priya is incredibly thorough. She took time to explain everything clearly. The clinic is clean, modern, and the staff are so warm. Highly recommend!

testimonials.name: Krishnamurthy V.
testimonials.text: I've been managing my diabetes here for 3 years. Dr. Senthil's guidance has transformed my lifestyle. My HbA1c is now under control!

testimonials.name: Anitha P.
testimonials.text: Brought my daughter here for a routine checkup. Dr. Vikram made her feel so comfortable. The entire experience was seamless and professional.
